tiers.name: Source Fast Gate
tiers.purpose: Cheap deterministic checks required on each source PR and repeated on the synthetic combined head.

tiers.name: Structural Contract
tiers.purpose: Mechanical architecture, workflow, docs, and repo-rule checks.

tiers.name: Explicit Deep Evidence
tiers.purpose: Manual, scheduled, or event-driven deep evidence that never starts from or delays ordinary PR Ready.

tiers.name: Preview Evidence
tiers.purpose: Hosted manual/event visual, a11y, performance, and preview evidence outside the source-PR event.

tiers.name: Combined Integration
tiers.purpose: Affected unit, one hosted build-plus-layout workspace, path-selected Xcode and UI visual (Storybook, Chromatic, Playwright smoke) gates, and model-free semantic evals for GitHub's exact merge-group head.

tiers.name: Production Release
tiers.purpose: Each exact successful main CI attempt feeds one fixed production-mutation FIFO from authorization through staging, promotion, centralized rollback, immutable probes, canonical proof, marker, and best-effort notification; one hosted monitor retry is bounded to controller attempt 1.

tiers.name: Post-deploy Verification
tiers.purpose: Hosted public, homepage, and Lighthouse probes target the immutable release URL under the controller lease; authenticated smoke runs only when a complete credential pair exists, while public Better Auth/OAuth gates remain blocking. When a controller generation is superseded before those in-lease probes run, a read-only follow-up re-probes the landed canonical production deployment outside the lease.

tiers.name: Scheduled Cleanup
tiers.purpose: Report-first cleanup loops for flakes, coverage drift, harness health, and main-CI repair.

jobs.name: Path Changes
jobs.remediation: Repair exact base/head resolution; path and brand classification fail closed instead of producing a false docs-only skip.

jobs.name: ci-fast
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run biome:check
jobs.remediation: Fix TypeScript, Biome, ESLint server-boundary, or proxy guard failures before expanding the change.

jobs.name: CI Risk Classifier
jobs.remediation: Risk classification failed or the manifest drifted. Validate .github/ci-harness/manifest.json and rerun the classifier on the changed-file list.

jobs.name: Secret Scan (gitleaks + trufflehog)
jobs.remediation: Remove the detected credential or high-entropy secret from the exact diff and rotate it if it was ever published.

jobs.name: Migration Guard
jobs.remediation: Repair unsafe or invalid migrations; this remains its own exact required ruleset context on source and combined heads.

jobs.name: Visual Approval Guard
jobs.remediation: A visual baseline surface changed without human approval. Review the baseline diff and apply the `visual-approved` label; the labeled event re-runs the guard and turns this required ruleset context green without a new push.

jobs.name: Unit Tests
jobs.remediation: Run the failing Vitest file locally, add or update regression coverage, and keep quarantined tests in the quarantine lane.

jobs.name: Build + Layout (combined)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm run build:web && pnpm --filter @jovie/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/hud-scroll.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.noauth.ts --project=chromium
jobs.remediation: Repair the exact combined-head build or deterministic layout regression; build and layout intentionally share one hosted workspace without artifact transport.

jobs.name: iOS Build + Test (combined)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm run ios:lint && pnpm run ios:test
jobs.remediation: Repair the path-selected Xcode build or test regression on the exact combined head; source PRs run only the portable iOS fast contract.

jobs.name: Storybook Visual + A11y (combined)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm --filter @jovie/web run build-storybook && pnpm --filter @jovie/web run test:a11y
jobs.remediation: Repair the Storybook bundle or the interaction/axe story regression on the exact combined head; the scheduled visual-a11y.yml lane remains the deep audit owner.

jobs.name: Chromatic Visual Regression (combined)
jobs.remediation: Review and accept the Chromatic visual changes or fix the unintended rendering diff on the exact combined head. Local reproduction needs CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN; merge_group runs are secret-safe because fork heads never enter the queue.

jobs.name: UI Playwright Visual Smoke (combined)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm run build:web && pnpm --filter @jovie/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/a11y.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=chromium && pnpm --filter @jovie/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-overflow.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.smoke.mobile.ts
jobs.remediation: Repair the secret-free DB-free visual smoke (axe keyboard/focus or mobile document-overflow) against the exact combined-head build; Neon-backed page-level visual evidence stays with the scheduled visual-regression.yml lane.

jobs.name: Promptfoo Evals (deterministic)
jobs.remediation: Repair deterministic chat/eval semantics on the exact combined head. Live model credentials remain disabled in this gate.

jobs.name: Golden Eval Set (deterministic)
jobs.remediation: Repair the model-free golden semantic regression before the combined head can leave the queue.

jobs.name: Lighthouse (public routes manual)
jobs.remediation: Public route performance or viewport stability regressed. Use the uploaded Lighthouse and Playwright artifacts before changing thresholds.

jobs.name: Lighthouse (dashboard manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested dashboard Lighthouse run regressed. Fix the route behavior or budget drift instead of bypassing it.

jobs.name: Lighthouse (onboarding manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested onboarding Lighthouse run regressed. Verify /start with the test-auth bypass.

jobs.name: Lighthouse (admin manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested admin Lighthouse run regressed. Verify the admin persona and uploaded artifacts.

jobs.name: Lighthouse (chat manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested chat Lighthouse run regressed. Fix the chat route behavior or budget drift instead of bypassing the informational baseline.

jobs.name: A11y (axe)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested public-route axe audit regressed. Fix the WCAG violation in the page or component instead of raising the allowed-violation baseline.

jobs.name: A11y (authenticated, informational)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm --filter=@jovie/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/a11y.spec.ts tests/e2e/chat-axe.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested authenticated axe run regressed. Fix the violation behind auth; the lane is informational evidence and never feeds PR Ready.

jobs.name: E2E Smoke (manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested smoke run regressed. Use the Playwright report and keep full E2E out of the default PR path.

jobs.name: Golden Path (manual)
jobs.nextLocalCommand: doppler run --project jovie-web --config dev -- pnpm --filter @jovie/web run test:e2e:golden-path:ci
jobs.remediation: The launch-gate golden path (signup -> onboarding -> import -> live public profile) regressed. Reproduce locally with the pinned Doppler command; do not weaken the spec to pass.

jobs.name: Extended Smoke (manual)
jobs.remediation: A manually dispatched extended preview smoke suite failed. Inspect the Playwright report and fix the fixture or product regression before rerunning it.

jobs.name: DB Migrate (manual deep lane)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested migration deep lane failed against the ephemeral Neon branch. Reproduce with the same drizzle migrations locally and repair the migration instead of skipping the lane.

jobs.name: E2E DB Migrate
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm --filter=@jovie/web run drizzle:migrate:ci && pnpm --filter=@jovie/web run seed:test-data
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested E2E migrate/seed producer failed against the ephemeral Neon branch. Fix the migration or seed drift before requesting full preview E2E evidence.

jobs.name: Full E2E (Preview)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested full preview E2E run regressed. Use the sharded Playwright report, keep quarantined specs in the quarantine lane, and fix the product or fixture regression before rerunning.

jobs.name: Admin E2E Smoke
jobs.nextLocalCommand: pnpm --filter=@jovie/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-pages-health.spec.ts --grep "Admin Pages Health Check" --project=chromium
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested admin smoke run regressed. Verify the admin persona credentials and fix the admin page regression instead of quarantining the spec.

jobs.name: Neon DB
jobs.remediation: The ephemeral Neon branch producer failed or hit the branch limit. Inspect the cleanup and admission-probe output; downstream manual evidence lanes cannot start without its connection artifact.

jobs.name: Preview Deploy (manual)
jobs.remediation: An explicitly requested preview failed. Check Vercel build/deploy logs and the PR summary URL.

jobs.name: Production Release
jobs.remediation: Inspect the exact CI-attempt-authorized controller generation. All production mutations share production-mutation FIFO, uncertain gates fail red without rollback, and only one confirmed-regression rollback owner may restore the recorded previous deployment.

jobs.name: Main Release Ready
jobs.remediation: Use the one-shot exact-SHA merge-group proof or repair every unconditional direct-main fallback lane; API ambiguity fails closed and is never polled into readiness.

jobs.name: Production Verified
jobs.remediation: Repair immutable-URL public, homepage, or Lighthouse proof, public Better Auth/OAuth gates, or the leased final canonical ID/SHA check. Authenticated smoke is explicit optional evidence until a complete credential pair is configured.

jobs.name: Post-Deploy Probes (supersession follow-up)
jobs.remediation: A controller generation was superseded before its in-lease probes ran, so the follow-up re-probed the landed canonical production deployment. Inspect the resolved exact deployment ID/URL/SHA evidence and fix the product regression; never repair by gating deploys on this read-only lane.

jobs.name: Test Flakiness Report
jobs.remediation: Keep flake cleanup report-first. Do not let flake reports mutate production or block normal deploys.

riskRules.title: CI and workflow control plane
riskRules.reason: Workflow and CI-control changes can silently alter merge, deploy, or agent feedback behavior.

riskRules.title: Agent control plane
riskRules.reason: Agent policy, evidence, and automation changes affect unattended code shipping.

riskRules.title: Auth and identity
riskRules.reason: Identity regressions can lock out users or invalidate auth handoff paths.

riskRules.title: Activation, AI, and background data flows
riskRules.reason: Activation and automated data-flow regressions can strand new users, cross tenant boundaries, or silently stop background work.

riskRules.title: Billing and money movement
riskRules.reason: Billing and entitlement regressions can create revenue, access, or trust failures.

riskRules.title: Database and migrations
riskRules.reason: Schema and database changes need isolated migration evidence and human-readable rollback context.

riskRules.title: Proxy and middleware
riskRules.reason: Proxy and middleware changes can break routing, auth, CSP, and public access globally.

riskRules.title: Environment and runtime config
riskRules.reason: Runtime config and dependency changes can alter build, deploy, or secret-bound behavior.

riskRules.title: Public UI and profile surfaces
riskRules.reason: Public UI changes need preview or visual evidence, but are not automatically a human-review stop.
